banner: You're viewing this with 2 others. Comments and cursors sync in real time.
prototypeNote: Preview · multiplayer is faked in this prototype — comments persist in memory only.

dp_9012.author: Saurabh Gupta
dp_9012.text: Delivery confirmation is the strongest piece. Shiprocket signature came through at 14:32 on 06 Apr.

dp_9012.author: Arjun Reddy
dp_9012.text: Agree. I'd also attach the 14-day pattern showing customer opened 3 support tickets after delivery but none mentioned size until chargeback.

dp_9012.author: Kavya Venkatesh
dp_9012.text: Good catch. The customer's tone in those tickets was friendly — that's an unusual shift into a dispute. Worth including a timeline comparison.

dp_9011.author: Arjun Reddy
dp_9011.text: 31% win probability. Cost-benefit says refund. I think we accept and move on.
